title: Skahtul

{{Quote|I have a contract from Xizor. The bounty is on Luke Skywalker.|Skahtul|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Skahtul''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and tried to negotiate a larger reward for the capture by playing the two factions who wanted Skywalker against each other. She admired what Luke had done against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], even having some sympathies for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], but she needed [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|At last, Skywalker, we meet.|Skahtul|<ref name="DS" />}}
[[File:SkahtulStalksSkywalker-ShadowSyndicate.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Skahtul, following [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]]]
When the [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] posted bounty on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] head, Skahtul accepted the contract. She tracked Skywalker to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where, in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], she met an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] operative, who would provide her with backup. The two planned to ambush Skywalker when he would approach Xizor, observing the [[Mos Espa Circuit|Mos Espa Race]]. [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Company]] had provided several large luxury sand barges from which spectators could watch the race; Skahtul was allowed onto Xizor's personal barge, where she waited for Skywalker to arrive.<ref name="DS" />

After finally spotting the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], Skahtul stepped in front of him, armed with a heavy blaster pistol. However, Skywalker was ready for the encounter, because he had lured the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] into his trap, and not the other way around. During the battle an errant blaster bolt hit the steering vane of the sail barge, and it careened out of control. Following the barge's crash into sand, Skahtul saw no sign of the Jedi, but was determined to continue her pursuit.<ref name="DS" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], Skahtul led a [[Skahtul's coalition|coalition]] of bounty hunters to [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], where they finally captured Luke Skywalker. Skywalker was wanted dead by Xizor, but alive by Vader. As such, Skahtul kept Skywalker in a compound on Kothlis while she tried to get the highest price out of them. This backfired, as Skywalker escaped the compound with the help of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].<ref name="sote">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>

[[4 ABY/Legends|A year later]], Skahtul was on [[Hurd's Moon]] and met with [[Savan]], the niece of Xizor, who was on a mission to capture the [[Human replica droid]] [[Guri]]. The droid was under the protection of her creator, the droid scientist [[Massad Thrumble]], when [[Kar Yang]], hired by Savan, invaded his protected place to steal Guri. After the failed attempt, Thrumble upgraded his security making impossible for anyone else to approach Guri, and Skahtul informed Savan of the difficult situation. Skahtul advised Savan to wait until Guri left before they would be able to capture her, though Savan ignored her.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref>
